response:
Subject: Farewell and Thank You

Dear team, today is my last day, and I want to say how grateful I am to have worked with all of you.  
I have learned so much from this group and will always appreciate the support, collaboration, and kindness you have shown me.  
It has been a pleasure sharing projects, challenges, and successes together.  
Please stay in touch, and feel free to reach me at my personal email.  
Wishing you all continued success and happiness in the future.
